name: Jason Johnson, Cruz for President
subject: We need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cruz for President
body:
Patriot,

A week ago, Senator Ted Cruz announced <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M-AncjlTHpY> his campaign for the Republican nomination for President of the United States. Since then, the response has been overwhelming.

Our goal was to raise $1 million in a week. We did it in a day. Then we doubled the goal to $2 million in the first week. We did it in three days. We need your help to keep it up <https://donate.tedcruz.org/c/FO0029/>!

WATCH: <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M-AncjlTHpY>

SHARE: <http://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M-AncjlTHpY>

TWEET: <http://twitter.com/home?status=I%20am%20proud%20to%20stand%20with%20%40tedcruz%20to%20reignite%20the%20promise%20of%20America%21%20WATCH%20and%20RT%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DM-AncjlTHpY>

There is a critical fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight, and we have an opportunity to shock the world -- but we can only do it with your help <https://donate.tedcruz.org/c/FO0029/>. Will you support Ted with a contribution right now <https://donate.tedcruz.org/c/FO0029/>?

For liberty,
Jason Johnson
Chief Political Strategist
Cruz for President

DONATE: <https://donate.tedcruz.org/c/FO0029/>
Paid for by Cruz for President

www.tedcruz.org
P.O. Box 25376, Houston, TX 77265 | (713) 353-4330

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may unsubscribe here: http://act.tedcruz.org/UnsubscribePage.html?mkt_unsubscribe=1&mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonuK%2FJZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4ASMBlI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D.
